description_long: This object is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a streamlined, manta ray-like silhouette and a predominantly black exterior accented by subtle blue highlights. The wings are broad and sharply swept, extending outward with a slight upward curve at the tips, giving the aircraft a dynamic and aggressive appearance. The fuselage is narrow and tapers smoothly toward the rear, with a cockpit area that is seamlessly integrated into the forward section. The tail features a distinctive twin vertical stabilizer configuration, each stabilizer curving outward, adding to the unique profile. The underside appears smooth, with no visible landing gear, suggesting a design focused on aerodynamic efficiency. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the aircraft's advanced, high-tech aesthetic.
description: A sleek, black futuristic airplane with swept wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a glossy finish accented by blue highlights.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the manta ray-like shape, broad swept wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thin, streamlined fuselage and the upward curve of the wings.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the wide wingspan, narrow nose, and the prominent twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the streamlined body and the unique tail configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and upward-curved tips, no visible winglets, and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: No visible external engines; engine type not visually apparent.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizer configuration with outward-curving fins, resembling a V-tail but with separated stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit seamlessly integrated into the fuselage, likely single-seat with a streamlined canopy.
